news.headline: Syria presidency: 'Under the patronage of the President of the Syrian Arab Republic, Mr. Ahmad Al-Shara, a memorandum of understanding was signed between the Syrian Ministry of Energy and the UCC International Group to develop the energy sector in Syria.'

news.summary: A prominent growth equity investor, One Peak, recently finalized a deal to offload its stake in Shine Analytics Limited, known as Brightflag, to Wolters Kluwer (Euronext: WKL). Wolters Kluwer, a renowned provider of information solutions, software, and services for professionals worldwide, made the purchase. Brightflag, a top AI-powered legal operations platform, empowers corporate legal departments worldwide to enhance visibility, automation, and cost management within the legal sector.
news.headline: One Peak sells its interest in Brightflag to Wolters Kluwer, making a 6x return. Brightflag is an AI-driven legal operations platform.

news.summary: In Osaka, Japan on May 29, 2025, the sixth edition of the "Made-in-Shanghai" event showcased Shanghai's fashion ecosystem through creative exhibits, pop-up stores, and twin-city forums. Running from May 21 to 25, the event highlighted the city's fashion industry on an international platform.
news.headline: "Made-in-Shanghai" event showcases Shanghai's fashion ecosystem in Osaka, featuring creative exhibits, pop-up stores, and forums.

news.summary: Stark Flight, a leading agricultural drone technology company based in New York, unveiled a state-of-the-art drone platform aimed at revolutionizing modern farming practices. The innovative technology promises unmatched precision, significant cost reductions, and environmental advantages for farmers, agribusinesses, and researchers. By leveraging this solution, stakeholders can enhance crop management, lower operational expenses, and support sustainable methods in response to the growing demands in agriculture. The global market for agricultural drones is expected to hit $10.2 billion by 2030 as a result of the increasing requirements for efficient resource allocation and improved crop productivity. Stark Flight’s cutting-edge platform tackles these issues by integrating advanced drones with high-tech sensors, radar, and automated flight technologies. Contrary to conventional farming approaches involving tractors and crop-dusting planes, these drones deliver precise, versatile, and data-informed insights, establishing them as indispensable instruments for present-day agriculture.
news.headline: Stark Flight launches advanced agri drones transforming farming with precision, cost savings. Global market to hit $10.2B by 2030.

news.summary: In Toronto, Scene+ has introduced Scene+ Travel, in collaboration with Expedia, for Scene+ members to book travel packages, providing chances to save money and earn/redeem points for future travels. This initiative allows members to accumulate points not just on airfare but also on hotel bookings. Responding to member feedback for more point-earning options and flexibility, Scene+ aims to enhance the travel experience for its members.
news.headline: Scene+ Travel, powered by Expedia, offers travel packages to members, enabling them to earn and redeem points. Members can earn points on hotel bookings along with airfare, enhancing flexibility. Members seek new ways to save and earn points.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global population has reached a staggering 7.8 billion people, with Asia being the most populated continent. The study also highlighted the concerning fact that nearly 1.3 billion tons of food is wasted annually, leading to significant environmental and economic impacts. Additionally, the report pointed out that the number of species facing extinction has risen to over 1 million. This data underscores the urgent need for greater sustainability efforts and conservation initiatives to protect our planet for future generations.
news.headline: Judge expands block on Trump's ban on foreign students at Harvard, 📈 reflecting growing opposition.

news.summary: Taste of Iceland 2025, presented by Inspired by Iceland, will make its debut in Nashville, Tennessee on May 29, 2025. This festival aims to showcase the richness of Icelandic culture through a diverse range of events spread throughout the city. This marks the first time the festival will take place in Nashville, offering visitors a unique opportunity to immerse themselves in all things Icelandic.
news.headline: Taste of Iceland Festival debuts in Nashville June 26-28, showcasing Icelandic culture through events. #Nashville #IcelandicCulture #Festival

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, F45 Training Holdings Inc. has partnered with Hyperice to improve the recovery experience for its members. F45 Training is known for its effective and enjoyable group workouts, and this collaboration will bring state-of-the-art Hyperice technology to select F45 Training studios globally. This partnership aims to offer advanced wellness solutions to F45 members, combining fitness expertise with high-performance recovery technology.
news.headline: F45 Training partners with Hyperice to enhance global exercise recovery experience; introduces tech in select studios.

news.summary: Irving, TX - May 29, 2025 - Leading skincare brand, Revision Skincare®, is excited to introduce the Triple-Action Exfoliator and bring back their popular product, the Hydrating Serum, rebranded as HA HydraSerum+™. The launch includes the release of these products, catering to skincare enthusiasts looking for advanced solutions. Stay tuned for their availability in the market.
news.headline: Revision Skincare® introduces Triple-Action Exfoliator and HA HydraSerum+™ in Irving, Texas. Launch includes new products and reintroduced bestseller.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Rune Labs unveiled a partnership with Parkinson’s Foundation to advance precision medicine for Parkinson’s disease (PD). This initiative aims to speed up the identification of genetic and digital markers for PD, crucial for enhancing diagnostics, therapy creation, and clinical trial structuring. The program will link gene variations to actual symptom and medication information, uncovering connections between wearable-based markers and Parkinson’s disease.
news.headline: Rune Labs partners with Parkinson's Foundation to study genetic and digital biomarkers for Parkinson's disease, aiming for breakthroughs.

news.summary: 2-10 Home Buyers Warranty, a subsidiary of Frontdoor, Inc. (NASDAQ: FTDR), is recognizing National Homeownership Month in June by reaffirming its commitment to providing top-tier warranty services for home builders and buyers. The company's integration into the Frontdoor portfolio has been beneficial, offering added value to partners. Celebrating the occasion, they emphasize their dedication to enhancing the homebuying experience for all stakeholders.
news.headline: 2-10 Home Buyers Warranty celebrates National Homeownership Month, supporting builders and buyers with quality warranty services.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Kochav Defense Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: KCHVU) successfully completed its initial public offering of 25,300,000 units priced at $10.00 per unit, with an additional 3,300,000 units issued due to the full exercise of the underwriters' over-allotment option. This brought the total gross proceeds to $253,000,000. The Company's units are now trading on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol “KCHVU” since May 28, 2025. Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share and one right to receive one seventh (1/7) of a Class A ordinary share after the completion of the Company’s initial business combination. Following the units' separation for individual trading, the Class A ordinary shares and rights are anticipated to be listed on Nasdaq under the symbols “KCHV” and “KCHVR,” respectively.
news.headline: Kochav Defense Acquisition Corp. completes $253M IPO, offering 25.3M units at $10/unit on Nasdaq under symbol "KCHVU".

news.summary: Shares of companies connected to the artificial intelligence sector experienced a surge on Thursday, following Nvidia's positive forecast regarding the demand for AI data centers. This resulted in a notable increase in stock prices for companies involved in this megatrend. The encouraging report from Nvidia had a significant impact on the market, with stock values taking a considerable upturn. The boost in AI data center stocks was directly linked to the optimistic outlook provided by Nvidia, reflecting a growing interest in the potential of artificial intelligence within the tech industry.
news.headline: AI data center stocks increased after Nvidia's positive report on AI demand, boosting investor confidence.

news.summary: In a partnership agreement, United Airlines secures a presence at JFK airport, while JetBlue obtains increased accessibility to Newark airport. The alliance between the two airlines has been announced, however, it has not positively impacted the stock of an undisclosed airline, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: United and JetBlue form an alliance gaining United access to JFK and JetBlue more access to Newark airports. JetBlue stock not helped.

news.summary: Arista Corp experienced a decline in its stock value as Nvidia announced securing Meta Platforms and Google as new clients for Ethernet networking equipment within data centers. The company's stock saw a decrease following this news.
news.headline: Arista stock drops as Nvidia secures Meta Platforms and Google as new networking customers for Ethernet gear.

news.summary: Driver Alon Day has been chosen to drive in three ARCA Menards Series races in Connecticut, California, and New York. The sponsorship deal was revealed on May 29, 2025, by Jet Support Services, Inc. (JSSI) and Neil Book. Day will be competing in the road course events as part of the partnership.
news.headline: JSSI sponsors racing champ Alon Day for 3 ARCA Menards Series events in CT, CA, and NY.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025 in Madison, Wisconsin, Nordic® revealed its participation in the ServiceNow Partner and Reseller Programs to broaden the reach of the ServiceNow AI Platform, products, and services to healthcare institutions nationwide. This collaboration will enable Nordic to offer...
news.headline: Nordic partners with ServiceNow to boost healthcare digital transformation in US. Expanding AI offerings for organizations.

news.summary: A new franchise of a mortgage brokerage company is opening in Cypress and is holding a live ribbon-cutting event on May 29, 2025. The event will feature food, drinks, entertainment, and opportunities to win exciting prizes. Motto Mortgage is known as the first and only national mortgage brokerage.
news.headline: Motto Mortgage DreamNest in Cypress will hold a grand opening on June 7th with ribbon cutting, entertainment, prizes.

news.summary: HP Inc (NYSE: HPQ) released its second-quarter earnings report, which fell below expectations. The company generated $13.22 billion in revenue, surpassing analyst forecasts of $13.15 billion. Despite this, HP's adjusted earnings for the quarter were at 71 cents per share, missing the estimated 80 cents per share. CEO Enrique Lores highlighted the solid revenue growth, especially in Personal Systems, and the continuous progress in their future of work strategy. HP anticipates third-quarter adjusted earnings to range between 68 cents and 80 cents per share. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Analysts cut HP forecasts after it reported Q2 revenue of $13.22B (above $13.15B est.) and earnings of 71 cents per share.

news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio on May 29, 2025, TinyWins introduced digital, development, and AI-powered advancements to The Shipyard. This addition completes their Paid, Owned, and Earned model aimed at "Engineering Brand Love." The Shipyard, recognized as one of the country's rapidly expanding independent agencies, made this announcement.
news.headline: The Shipyard acquires TinyWins, a global digital studio, enhancing its services; aims for "Engineer Brand Love". Columbus, May 29, 2025.

news.summary: Riverbed, based in Redwood City, California, has been recognized by Gartner for the second consecutive year as a Leader in the Magic Quadrant for Digital Employee Experience (DEX) tools. This positioning underscores Riverbed's strong performance and innovation in providing tools to enhance digital employee experience.
news.headline: Riverbed labeled Leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Employee Experience for second consecutive year.

Israel has announced that it would create 22 settlements in the occupied West Bank, the biggest expansion in decades, has been criticised by UK officials. This expansion also includes legalizing of several that were built as outposts built without government authorization.

news.summary: Following the recent retirement of Lorna Wisham, a new leader is being sought for the FirstEnergy Foundation by the Company based in Akron, Ohio. On May 29, 2025, FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) revealed that the Foundation has already disbursed over $2 million in the initial two quarters of the year.
news.headline: FirstEnergy Foundation donates $2M to nonprofits in first half of 2025, seeks new leader. Company located in Akron, Ohio.

news.summary: Drawing on over 25 years of expertise in intricate financial affairs, Cowie is aiding organizations in extracting value and maneuvering through crucial transformations. In an announcement made in New York on May 29, 2025, Paladin Management, a middle-market advisory company focused on enhancing value through financial and strategic guidance, highlighted Cowie's role.
news.headline: Financial expert Andrew Cowie joins Paladin Management as Managing Director, leveraging 25+ years of experience. (Character count: 94)

news.summary: In Dallas on May 29, 2025, the Supreme Court made a decision to uphold the Trump-era ban on transgender individuals serving in the military. This has sparked new discussions on personal liberties, confidence in governmental bodies, and the influence of gun rights proponents in societal matters. The ruling now allows the ban to be enforced, potentially affecting a significant number of transgender service members.
news.headline: Supreme Court allows Trump's transgender military ban to proceed, sparking debates about personal freedoms and gun rights.

news.summary: A report titled "Medical Cannabis Market - Global Industry Size, Share, Trends, Opportunity, and Forecast, 2020-2030F" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Medical Cannabis Market was worth USD 28.54 billion in 2024 and is projected to hit USD 87.41 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 20.51%. The notable expansion is supported by augmented government investments, an uptick in research and development endeavors, and wider acknowledgment of medical cannabis.
news.headline: Global medical cannabis market valued at USD 28.54 Billion in 2024 to reach USD 87.41 Billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 20.51%.

news.summary: In Farmingdale, New York on May 29, 2025, BEDGEAR®, a leading company in the sleep industry known for its innovative solutions for individuals seeking to Wake Ready®, celebrated the recognition of its Founder/CEO, Eugene Alletto, who was honored as the 2025 recipient at the American Cancer Awards.
news.headline: BEDGEAR CEO Eugene Alletto recognized by American Cancer Society at 2025 gala that raised $500,000.

news.summary: A new terminal has been launched in New York on May 29, 2025, named Stable Sea, offering deep liquidity, real-time foreign exchange services, and compliant stablecoin conversion. This initiative aims to enhance stablecoin utility for fintechs and global businesses facing challenges in accessing these services. The company's flagship product is now available for use, providing access to these essential features.
news.headline: Stable Sea launches Terminal for businesses, offering global stablecoin management with deep liquidity and real-time FX.

news.summary: Sportiqe, a renowned global lifestyle apparel brand recognized for its superior comfort and quality, revealed on May 29, 2025, its official sponsorship of Major League Pickleball (MLP by DoorDash). Sportiqe will serve as the league's dedicated apparel partner, providing attire for athletes.
news.headline: Sportiqe partners with Major League Pickleball, providing apparel for athletes. Official sponsorship of MLP by DoorDash.

news.summary: A recent announcement from First Tech Federal Credit Union unveiled the launch of a new initiative as part of the First Tech Beyond program, aimed at honoring the achievements of up-and-coming tech enterprises and tech-focused nonprofit organizations. The initiative, titled "Spotlight on Tech," was revealed in SAN JOSE, Calif., and HILLSBORO, Ore., on May 29, 2025. This program serves as a platform to showcase the remarkable work of emerging tech firms and nonprofit organizations in the tech sector.
news.headline: First Tech FCU launches Spotlight on Tech initiative to celebrate emerging tech companies and nonprofits. May 29, 2025.

news.summary: Recognizing the visionaries, pioneers, and visionaries shaping progress SAN FRANCISCO, 29th May 2025 -- The prestigious Globee® Awards, renowned for their data-focused business recognition, revealed the victors of the 5th Annual 2025 Globee® Awards for Disruptors. The event showcased the accomplishments of innovative individuals and organizations leading change in various industries.
news.headline: 2025 Globee® Awards for Disruptors winners announced in San Francisco, honoring innovators and game-changers.

news.summary: In Wabash, Indiana, on May 29, 2025, FFW Corporation (OTC PINK: FFWC), the parent company of Crossroads Bank, announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.30 per share of common stock. With a closing price of $40.30 on May 22, 2025, this dividend is set to be paid on June 27, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of June 13, 2025.
news.headline: FFW Corp (OTC PINK: FFWC) declares $0.30/qtr cash dividend per share, payable on June 27, 2025, to shareholders as of June 13.
